cards.name: 魔术师
cards.up: Skill, diplomacy, address, subtlety
cards.down: Physician, Magus, mental disease, disgrace, disquiet.

cards.name: 女祭司
cards.up: Secrets, mystery, the future as yet unrevealed
cards.down: Passion, moral or physical ardour, conceit, surface knowledge.

cards.name: 皇后
cards.up: Fruitfulness, action, initiative, length of days
cards.down: Light, truth, the unravelling of involved matters, public rejoicings

cards.name: 皇帝
cards.up: Stability, power, protection, realization
cards.down: Benevolence, compassion, credit

cards.name: 教皇
cards.up: Marriage, alliance, captivity, servitude
cards.down: Society, good understanding, concord, overkindness, weakness.

cards.name: 恋人
cards.up: Attraction, love, beauty, trials overcome.
cards.down: Failure, foolish designs. Another account speaks of marriage frustrated and contrarieties of all kinds.

cards.name: 战车
cards.up: Succour, providence also war, triumph, presumption, vengeance, trouble.
cards.down: Riot, quarrel, dispute, litigation, defeat.

cards.name: Fortitude
cards.up: Power, energy, action, courage, magnanimity
cards.down: Despotism, abuse if power, weakness, discord, sometimes even disgrace.

cards.name: 隐士
cards.up: Prudence, circumspection
cards.down: Concealment, disguise, policy, fear, unreasoned caution.

cards.name: Wheel Of Fortune
cards.up: Destiny, fortune, success, elevation, luck, felicity.
cards.down: Increase, abundance, superfluity.

cards.name: 正义
cards.up: Equity, rightness, probity, executive
cards.down: Law in all its departments, legal complications, bigotry, bias, excessive severity.

cards.name: 倒吊人
cards.up: Wisdom, circumspection, discernment, trials, sacrifice, intuition, divination, prophecy.
cards.down: Selfishness, the crowd, body politic.

cards.name: 死神
cards.up: End, mortality, destruction, corruption also, for a man, the loss of a benefactor for a woman, many contrarieties
cards.down: Inertia, sleep, lethargy, petrifaction, somnambulism

cards.name: 节制
cards.up: Economy, moderation, frugality, management, accommodation.
cards.down: Things connected with churches, religions, sects, the priesthood, sometimes even the priest who will marry the Querent

cards.name: 恶魔
cards.up: Ravage, violence, vehemence, extraordinary efforts, force, fatality
cards.down: Evil fatality, weakness, pettiness, blindness.

cards.name: 高塔
cards.up: Misery, distress, indigence, adversity, calamity, disgrace, deception, ruin. It is a card in particular of unforeseen catastrophe.
cards.down: According to one account, the same in a lesser degree also oppression, imprisonment, tyranny.

cards.name: 星星
cards.up: Loss, theft, privation, abandonment
cards.down: Arrogance, haughtiness, impotence.

cards.name: 月亮
cards.up: Hidden enemies, danger, calumny, darkness, terror, deception, occult forces, error.
cards.down: Instability, inconstancy, silence, lesser degrees of deception and error.

cards.name: 太阳
cards.up: Material happiness, fortunate marriage, contentment.
cards.down: The same in a lesser sense.

cards.name: The Last Judgment
cards.up: Change of position, renewal, outcome. Another account specifies total loss though lawsuit.
cards.down: Weakness, pusillanimity, simplicity

cards.name: 愚者
cards.up: Folly, mania, extravagance, intoxication, delirium, frenzy, bewrayment.
cards.down: Negligence, absence, distribution, carelessness, apathy, nullity, vanity.

cards.name: 世界
cards.up: Assured success, recompense, voyage, route, emigration, flight, change of place.
cards.down: Inertia, fixity, stagnation, permanence.

cards.name: Page of Wands
cards.up: Dark young man, faithful, a lover, an envoy, a postman. Beside a man, he will bear favourable testimony concerning him. A dangerous rival, if followed by the Page of Cups. Has the chief qualities of his suit. He may signify family intelligence.
cards.down: Anecdotes, announcements, evil news. Also indecision and the instability which accompanies it.

cards.name: Knight of Wands
cards.up: Departure, absence, flight, emigration. A dark young man, friendly. Change of residence.
cards.down: Rupture, division, interruption, discord.

cards.name: Queen of Wands
cards.up: A dark woman, countrywoman, friendly, chaste, loving, honourable. If the card beside her signifies a man, she is well disposed towards him
cards.down: Good, economical, obliging, serviceable. Signifies also--but in certain positions and in the neighbourhood of other cards tending in such directions--opposition, jealousy, even deceit and infidelity.

cards.name: King of Wands
cards.up: Dark man, friendly, countryman, generally married, honest and conscientious. The card always signifies honesty, and may mean news concerning an unexpected heritage to fall in before very long.
cards.down: Good, but severe

cards.name: Ace of Wands
cards.up: Creation, invention, enterprise, the powers which result in these
cards.down: Fall, decadence, ruin, perdition, to perish also a certain clouded joy.

cards.name: Two of Wands
cards.up: Between the alternative readings there is no marriage possible
cards.down: Surprise, wonder, enchantment, emotion, trouble, fear.

cards.name: Three of Wands
cards.up: He symbolizes established strength, enterprise, effort, trade, commerce, discovery
cards.down: The end of troubles, suspension or cessation of adversity, toil and disappointment.

cards.name: Four of Wands
cards.up: They are for once almost on the surface--country life, haven of refuge, a species of domestic harvest-home, repose, concord, harmony, prosperity, peace, and the perfected work of these.
cards.down: The meaning remains unaltered

cards.name: Five of Wands
cards.up: Imitation, as, for example, sham fight, but also the strenuous competition and struggle of the search after riches and fortune. In this sense it connects with the battle of life. Hence some attributions say that it is a card of gold, gain, opulence.
cards.down: Litigation, disputes, trickery, contradiction.

cards.name: Six of Wands
cards.up: The card has been so designed that it can cover several significations
cards.down: Apprehension, fear, as of a victorious enemy at the gate

cards.name: Seven of Wands
cards.up: It is a card of valour, for, on the surface, six are attacking one, who has, however, the vantage position. On the intellectual plane, it signifies discussion, wordy strife
cards.down: Perplexity, embarrassments, anxiety. It is also a caution against indecision.

cards.name: Eight of Wands
cards.up: Activity in undertakings, the path of such activity, swiftness, as that of an express messenger
cards.down: Arrows of jealousy, internal dispute, stingings of conscience, quarrels

cards.name: Nine of Wands
cards.up: The card signifies strength in opposition. If attacked, the person will meet an onslaught boldly
cards.down: Obstacles, adversity, calamity.

cards.name: Ten of Wands
cards.up: A card of many significances, and some of the readings cannot be harmonized. I set aside that which connects it with honour and good faith. The chief meaning is oppression simply, but it is also fortune, gain, any kind of success, and then it is the oppression of these things. It is also a card of false-seeming, disguise, perfidy. The place which the figure is approaching may suffer from the rods that he carries. Success is stultified if the Nine of Swords follows, and if it is a question of a lawsuit, there will be certain loss.
cards.down: Contrarieties, difficulties, intrigues, and their analogies.

cards.name: Page of Cups
cards.up: Fair young man, one impelled to render service and with whom the Querent will be connected
cards.down: Taste, inclination, attachment, seduction, deception, artifice.

cards.name: Knight of Cups
cards.up: Arrival, approach--sometimes that of a messenger
cards.down: Trickery, artifice, subtlety, swindling, duplicity, fraud.

cards.name: Queen of Cups
cards.up: Good, fair woman
cards.down: The accounts vary

cards.name: King of Cups
cards.up: Fair man, man of business, law, or divinity
cards.down: Dishonest, double-dealing man

cards.name: Ace of Cups
cards.up: House of the true heart, joy, content, abode, nourishment, abundance, fertility
cards.down: House of the false heart, mutation, instability, revolution.

cards.name: Two of Cups
cards.up: Love, passion, friendship, affinity, union, concord, sympathy, the interrelation of the sexes, and--as a suggestion apart from all offices of divination--that desire which is not in Nature, but by which Nature is sanctified.
cards.down: Lust, cupidity, jealousy, wish, desire, but the card may also give, says W., "that desire which is not in nature, but by which nature is sanctified."

cards.name: Three of Cups
cards.up: The conclusion of any matter in plenty, perfection and merriment
cards.down: Expedition, dispatch, achievement, end. It signifies also the side of excess in physical enjoyment, and the pleasures of the senses.

cards.name: Four of Cups
cards.up: Weariness, disgust, aversion, imaginary vexations, as if the wine of this world had caused satiety only
cards.down: Novelty, presage, new instruction, new relations.

cards.name: Five of Cups
cards.up: A dark, cloaked figure, looking sideways at three prone cups two others stand upright behind him
cards.down: News, alliances, affinity, consanguinity, ancestry, return, false projects.

cards.name: Six of Cups
cards.up: A card of the past and of memories, looking back, as--for example--on childhood
cards.down: The future, renewal, that which will come to pass presently.

cards.name: Seven of Cups
cards.up: Fairy favours, images of reflection, sentiment, imagination, things seen in the glass of contemplation
cards.down: Desire, will, determination, project.

cards.name: Eight of Cups
cards.up: The card speaks for itself on the surface, but other readings are entirely antithetical--giving joy, mildness, timidity, honour, modesty. In practice, it is usually found that the card shews the decline of a matter, or that a matter which has been thought to be important is really of slight consequence--either for good or evil.
cards.down: Great joy, happiness, feasting.

cards.name: Nine of Cups
cards.up: Concord, contentment, physical bien-être
cards.down: Truth, loyalty, liberty

cards.name: Ten of Cups
cards.up: Contentment, repose of the entire heart
cards.down: Repose of the false heart, indignation, violence.

cards.name: Page of Pentacles
cards.up: Application, study, scholarship, reflection another reading says news, messages and the bringer thereof
cards.down: Prodigality, dissipation, liberality, luxury

cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.up: Utility, serviceableness, interest, responsibility, rectitude-all on the normal and external plane.
cards.down: inertia, idleness, repose of that kind, stagnation

cards.name: Queen of Pentacles
cards.up: Opulence, generosity, magnificence, security, liberty.
cards.down: Evil, suspicion, suspense, fear, mistrust.

cards.name: King of Pentacles
cards.up: Valour, realizing intelligence, business and normal intellectual aptitude, sometimes mathematical gifts and attainments of this kind
cards.down: Vice, weakness, ugliness, perversity, corruption, peril.

cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.up: Perfect contentment, felicity, ecstasy
cards.down: The evil side of wealth, bad intelligence

cards.name: Two of Pentacles
cards.up: On the one hand it is represented as a card of gaiety, recreation and its connexions, which is the subject of the design
cards.down: Enforced gaiety, simulated enjoyment, literal sense, handwriting, composition, letters of exchange.

cards.name: Three of Pentacles
cards.up: Métier, trade, skilled labour
cards.down: Mediocrity, in work and otherwise, puerility, pettiness, weakness.

cards.name: Four of Pentacles
cards.up: The surety of possessions, cleaving to that which one has, gift, legacy, inheritance.
cards.down: Suspense, delay, opposition.

cards.name: Five of Pentacles
cards.up: The card foretells material trouble above all, whether in the form illustrated--that is, destitution--or otherwise. For some cartomancists, it is a card of love and lovers-wife, husband, friend, mistress
cards.down: Disorder, chaos, ruin, discord, profligacy.

cards.name: Six of Pentacles
cards.up: Presents, gifts, gratification another account says attention, vigilance now is the accepted time, present prosperity, etc.
cards.down: Desire, cupidity, envy, jealousy, illusion.

cards.name: Seven of Pentacles
cards.up: These are exceedingly contradictory
cards.down: Cause for anxiety regarding money which it may be proposed to lend.

cards.name: Eight of Pentacles
cards.up: Work, employment, commission, craftsmanship, skill in craft and business, perhaps in the preparatory stage.
cards.down: Voided ambition, vanity, cupidity, exaction, usury. It may also signify the possession of skill, in the sense of the ingenious mind turned to cunning and intrigue.

cards.name: Nine of Pentacles
cards.up: Prudence, safety, success, accomplishment, certitude, discernment.
cards.down: Roguery, deception, voided project, bad faith.

cards.name: Ten of Pentacles
cards.up: Gain, riches
cards.down: Chance, fatality, loss, robbery, games of hazard

cards.name: Page of Swords
cards.up: Authority, overseeing, secret service, vigilance, spying, examination, and the qualities thereto belonging.
cards.down: More evil side of these qualities

cards.name: Knight of Swords
cards.up: Skill, bravery, capacity, defence, address, enmity, wrath, war, destruction, opposition, resistance, ruin. There is therefore a sense in which the card signifies death, but it carries this meaning only in its proximity to other cards of fatality.
cards.down: Imprudence, incapacity, extravagance.

cards.name: Queen of Swords
cards.up: Widowhood, female sadness and embarrassment, absence, sterility, mourning, privation, separation.
cards.down: Malice, bigotry, artifice, prudery, bale, deceit.

cards.name: King of Swords
cards.up: Whatsoever arises out of the idea of judgment and all its connexions-power, command, authority, militant intelligence, law, offices of the crown, and so forth.
cards.down: Cruelty, perversity, barbarity, perfidy, evil intention.

cards.name: Ace of Swords
cards.up: Triumph, the excessive degree in everything, conquest, triumph of force. It is a card of great force, in love as well as in hatred. The crown may carry a much higher significance than comes usually within the sphere of fortune-telling.
cards.down: The same, but the results are disastrous

cards.name: Two of Swords
cards.up: Conformity and the equipoise which it suggests, courage, friendship, concord in a state of arms
cards.down: Imposture, falsehood, duplicity, disloyalty.

cards.name: Three of Swords
cards.up: Removal, absence, delay, division, rupture, dispersion, and all that the design signifies naturally, being too simple and obvious to call for specific enumeration.
cards.down: Mental alienation, error, loss, distraction, disorder, confusion.

cards.name: Four of Swords
cards.up: Vigilance, retreat, solitude, hermit's repose, exile, tomb and coffin. It is these last that have suggested the design.
cards.down: Wise administration, circumspection, economy, avarice, precaution, testament.

cards.name: Five of Swords
cards.up: Degradation, destruction, revocation, infamy, dishonour, loss, with the variants and analogues of these.
cards.down: The same

cards.name: Six of Swords
cards.up: Journey by water, route, way, envoy, commissionary, expedient.
cards.down: Declaration, confession, publicity

cards.name: Seven of Swords
cards.up: Design, attempt, wish, hope, confidence
cards.down: Good advice, counsel, instruction, slander, babbling.

cards.name: Eight of Swords
cards.up: Bad news, violent chagrin, crisis, censure, power in trammels, conflict, calumny
cards.down: Disquiet, difficulty, opposition, accident, treachery

cards.name: Nine of Swords
cards.up: Death, failure, miscarriage, delay, deception, disappointment, despair.
cards.down: Imprisonment, suspicion, doubt, reasonable fear, shame.

cards.name: Ten of Swords
cards.up: Whatsoever is intimated by the design
cards.down: Advantage, profit, success, favour, but none of these are permanent
